title: bersama abyssinica var. engleriana
intro: Bersama abyssinica var. engleriana, also known as the Engler's Bersama, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bersama abyssinica var. engleriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
